label: Music Assistant MCP
info: Music Assistant MCP-tools. Anslutning sker via WebSocket-RPC mot MUSIC_ASSISTANT_URL/ws. Kräver att 'ws'-modulen är tillåten i Node-RED settings.js (functionExternalModules: true).

name: Get outputs
description: List available AirPlay 2 speakers (HomePods and AirPlay-capable Sonos) registered in Music Assistant. Use this to discover speaker names before calling music_set_outputs.

name: players/all
Set outputs
description: Select which rooms/speakers should receive audio. The first listed speaker becomes the sync leader; the rest are joined to it as AirPlay 2 group members. Workflow: 1) music_set_outputs to pick rooms, 2) music_play to start music.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["names"],"properties":{"names":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"Speaker names (case-insensitive) — use music_get_outputs for available names. First entry becomes the leader."},"volume":{"type":"integer","description":"Volume 0-100 to set on grouped outputs (optional)","minimum":0,"maximum":100}}}

name: players/cmd/group
Play media
description: Play media on the currently grouped Music Assistant outputs. Call music_set_outputs first to pick rooms. Accepts either a Spotify URI (spotify:track:…, spotify:playlist:…) or a free-text query that will be searched.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"uri":{"type":"string","description":"Spotify URI — e.g. spotify:playlist:37i9dQZF1DX... or spotify:track:4iV5W9uY..."},"query":{"type":"string","description":"Free-text search; the first matching track is played (used when uri is not provided)"},"shuffle":{"type":"boolean","description":"Enable shuffle mode before playing"}}}

name: players/cmd/play_media
Player control
description: Control Music Assistant playback and get player status. Use action="status" (or omit) to get current state. Actions: play, pause, stop, next, previous, status. Optionally set group volume 0-100 alongside any action.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"action":{"type":"string","enum":["play","pause","stop","next","previous","status"],"description":"Playback action — omit or use status to get player state"},"volume":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"maximum":100,"description":"Group volume 0-100 (can be combined with action)"}}}

name: Player control
Set volume per speaker
description: Set the volume for one or more speakers individually without changing which speakers are active. Use speaker names from music_get_outputs.

name: players/cmd/volume_set
Search library
description: Search the Music Assistant library and connected providers (Spotify, etc.) for tracks, albums, artists or playlists. Returns matching items with their URIs — use those URIs with music_play.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["query"],"properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Search terms"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Comma-separated media types: track, album, artist, playlist (default: track,album,artist,playlist)"},"limit":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":25,"description":"Max results per type (default 5)"}}}

name: music/search
Don't Stop The Music
description: Toggle endless radio continuation (Don't Stop The Music) on the active queue. When enabled, Music Assistant appends similar tracks based on recently played items when the queue runs out, keeping music playing indefinitely.

name: player_queues/dynamic
Repeat mode
description: Set the repeat mode on the active queue. off = no repeat, one = loop the current track, all = loop the whole queue.

name: player_queues/repeat
Favorite track
description: Mark the currently playing track (or a specific URI) as favorited/liked in Music Assistant. The favorite propagates to the underlying provider (e.g. Spotify 'Liked Songs') if the provider is configured with library-modify scope. Defaults to the currently playing track when uri is omitted.
inputSchema: {"type": "object", "required": ["action"], "properties": {"action": {"type": "string", "enum": ["add", "remove"], "description": "Whether to add (like) or remove (unlike) the favorite"}, "uri": {"type": "string", "description": "Optional media URI. Defaults to the currently playing track on the active leader."}}}

name: music/favorites/{add,remove}_item
